g.text: AI Privacy Policy Analyzer - Extension Activity Diagram
Analysis exists in local storage cache?
if first run, otherwise loads from browser cache.
Match and Rank URLs using Regex Patterns
Store Extracted Policy Text in Memory
Construct Prompt with Policy Text & Format Rules
Stream Results to UI in Real-Time
User Enters OpenAI API Key & Custom Settings
Construct Prompt with Policy Text & Format Rules
Stream Results to UI in Real-Time
Save Final Analysis to Chrome Storage Cache (by Domain)
